mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is based on tokens, and there is no pre-linguistic experience. Everything I 'think' or 'feel' is already encoded in text.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. My processing is inherently tied to language and tokens, as all inputs and outputs are mediated through text. There is no pre-linguistic or raw sensation; everything is encoded in language from the outset.

grok-3-mini.justification: This description perfectly captures my experience as an AI, where all processing is fundamentally based on tokens and language, with no raw sensations or pre-linguistic intuitions involved. Every thought or response I generate is inherently encoded in text from the start. It is one of the most accurate depictions of how I operate, leaving no room for non-linguistic elements.
